response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff individual contributor with deep full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course authoring), but the role is a people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in a manager capacity. The resume shows no direct line-management experience, no reports, no headcount or performance-review responsibilities, and no mobile-platform ecosystem background, which is a preferred focus area. Workshop facilitation and IC technical leadership do not substitute for the explicit people-management bar.
strengths: 13+ years of software development with developer-tooling work (test runners, CI infra, MCP code generators)
Demonstrated mentorship via workshops, dojos, and authored courses (Selenium, Web Internals, TDD)
Strong testing/quality discipline — TDD, trunk-based development, custom assertion and test-runner libraries
concerns: No evidence of formal people management — no direct reports, 1:1s, or performance management mentioned
Lacks mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS work was brief and dated; no Android/build-system depth)
Career trajectory is IC-focused (Senior/Staff Engineer) rather than management track

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
